interactions.name: Navigate to Submenu Link
interactions.description: Navigate to the submenu item's link using goToPage

interactions.name: Toggle Submenu

action_1.name: Check if item has submenu
action_1.description: Only toggle submenu if the item has one
action_1.__wwdescription: Only toggle submenu if the item has one

action_2.name: Toggle submenu visibility
action_2.description: Update the menu item to toggle its isOpen property
action_2.__wwdescription: Update the menu item to toggle its isOpen property

action_3.name: Check if item has link
action_3.description: Navigate only if the item has a valid link
action_3.__wwdescription: Navigate only if the item has a valid link

action_4.name: Navigate to page
action_4.description: Navigate to the page specified in the link
action_4.__wwdescription: Navigate to the page specified in the link

interactions.description: Toggle submenu visibility for items with submenus or navigate to page for items with links
